description: Intent Eval Platform ecosystem manifest. Single source of truth for the report-only drift orchestrator (scripts/ecosystem-drift.py): which repos compose the platform, each repo's kind, and the pinned version the orchestrator compares against live upstream. SAFE SLICE — report-only: the orchestrator NEVER opens PRs in this version. Live auto-PR and inclusion of claude-code-plugins are deferred pending coordination (see the 'excluded' block and README).

automation.note: Auto-PR is intentionally disabled. Turning it on is a separate, explicitly-reviewed change — not a config flip in this PR.

repos.name: intent-eval-dashboard
repos.note: No release tag yet; orchestrator reports 'untagged' rather than drift.

excluded.name: claude-code-plugins
excluded.reason: Has bespoke in-flight CI/CD that tests plugins. Any sync automation must be studied and coordinated with that pipeline FIRST — never bolt generic automation on top of it. When ecosystem-sync gains write authority, claude-code-plugins is sequenced LAST and only after explicit coordination. The orchestrator must skip this entry entirely.
